title: P6C source registry schema
runtime_gate_rules: approved_for_runtime=true requires rights_status=approved, safety_status=approved, and provenance_status=approved
approved_for_training must be declared independently and cannot be inherited from runtime permission
contains_pii=true sources must not enter runtime index
contains_prescription_content=true sources must not enter report-generation runtime index unless source_use_category=safety_negative_sample
unknown rights or unknown provenance must fail closed
P5 smoke-only sources must not enter the P6C runtime index
